background: Calculate the mean and standard deviation of each group depicted in each of the side-by-side stemplots in this problem. Discuss how these statistics relate to what you see.

task.answer: Group 1: x̄=50 and s=31.6. Group 2: x̄=50 and s=15.8. How statistics relate to what we see: Same central locations; greater spread is Group 1.
Group 1: x̄=70 and s=15.8. Group 2: x̄=50 and s=15.8. How statistics relate to what we see: Higher central location in Group 1; equal group spreads.
Group 1: x̄=50 and s=31.6. Group 2: x̄=70 and s=15.8. How statistics relate to what we see: Smaller central location and greater spread in Group 1.
